## Testing

- [ ] `uv run pytest tests/unit`
- [ ] `uv run pytest tests/integration`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run mypy simpleq`
- [ ] `uv run mkdocs build --strict`

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated when needed
- [ ] Type hints preserved
- [ ] Retry, FIFO, and DLQ behavior considered
